dialogue.cocojenna.afterrain.blind_port_: Blind Port's fog thins. The merchant folds his gambling table: "Souvenirs only today."
The sea breeze carries dried fish and catnip, not black mud.
dialogue.cocojenna.afterrain.first_cry_1: The rain has stopped. Cats in First Cry Village bask in the sun.
dialogue.cocojenna.afterrain.first_cry_2: The elder smiles: "You took the night away. The village remembers your names."
dialogue.cocojenna.afterrain.gear_town_1: The gears turn again. Ironpaw polishes his hammer: "Post-war orders are repairs and rebuilds."
dialogue.cocojenna.afterrain.gear_town_2: Town cats no longer stand guard day and night — they brew milk tea and draft blueprints.
dialogue.cocojenna.afterrain.moon_alley_: Moon Alley's neon lights return, softer than before.
Passing cats nod — a post-war greeting, not a challenge.
dialogue.cocojenna.afterrain.velvet_1: Sanhua weaves garlands at Velvet Forest: "Let war memories stay in picture books."
dialogue.cocojenna.afterrain.velvet_2: A lullaby hum drifts from the deep forest.
dialogue.cocojenna.blind_port.merchant_1: Blind Port's black market serves only the bold.
dialogue.cocojenna.blind_port.merchant_2: Black mud remnants, shadow crystals... good goods aren't cheap.
dialogue.cocojenna.first_cry.elder_1: Welcome, traveler. I am the elder of this village.
dialogue.cocojenna.first_cry.elder_2: Coco and Jenna followed you here—they need food and rest.
dialogue.cocojenna.first_cry.elder_3: Please put cat food in the village bowl. Let the sisters eat before we speak of the road ahead.
dialogue.cocojenna.first_cry.elder_hint: Fill the food bowl, or speak with the Samurai Cat—the quest will guide you.
dialogue.cocojenna.first_cry.elder_rewar: You earned the Samurai's respect. First Cry Village will remember this.
Take the Red Jade Yarn Ball and the Sequence Manual. The Cat Kingdom has only just begun.
dialogue.cocojenna.first_cry.narrator_1: Wind blows from the ruins of the Velvet Dynasty. You stand in First Cry Village; the monument glows faintly in the moonlight.
dialogue.cocojenna.gear_town.ironpaw_1: Welcome to Gear Town. I'm Ironpaw, the smith here.
dialogue.cocojenna.gear_town.ironpaw_2: Place a legendary weapon on the forge—I can enhance it up to +10. Materials are taken from your inventory.
dialogue.cocojenna.redemption.fallen_vel: On Dawn Highlands, someone hums an old royal lullaby in the wind.
Sanhua: "She returned — not as a monster, but as memory."
Velvet Country remembers every cat who left, and every soul who came home.
dialogue.cocojenna.samurai.defeat_2: Return to the monument and claim your reward from the elder.
dialogue.cocojenna.samurai.duel_1: Not enough. Let the blade speak.
dialogue.cocojenna.samurai.meet_2: Come within ten blocks and I will draw my blade. I do not chase cowards.
dialogue.cocojenna.undercat.ch1_complete: Thank you. Perhaps some things should not stay wrapped in tape forever.
Smuggler's Dock map unlocked — Chapter 2 awaits.
dialogue.cocojenna.undercat.ch1_trigger_: Beneath the Life Yarn tree, a hollow glows in the dark.
(Telepathy) Something ancient and sorrowful waits inside.
dialogue.cocojenna.undercat.ch2_complete: The seed is yours. My catnip is free for you forever.
An arena invitation burns in your pocket.
dialogue.cocojenna.undercat.ch2_farm_1: Sunlight pours through a crack — something huge grows in the catnip.
dialogue.cocojenna.undercat.ch2_farm_2: I'm Greenpaw! I messed up — it's becoming a dragon!
dialogue.cocojenna.undercat.ch2_one_eye_: Corrugata sent you? The deep river isn't safe lately…
Prove yourself and I'll lend you the Neon Mush.
dialogue.cocojenna.undercat.ch3_complete: You brought her back… the princess.
The key to the Silent Library is yours.
dialogue.cocojenna.undercat.ch3_scarface: You slew a catnip dragon. Want in? Win three fights.
Only true fighters are respected here.
dialogue.cocojenna.undercat.ch4_abbess_2: Truth is heavy. Will you listen?
dialogue.cocojenna.undercat.ch4_complete: Thank you. The secret is yours now.
Black mud was never an invader — it is Cat Kingdom's shadow.
dialogue.cocojenna.undercat.ch4_trial_1: In perfect silence, three memories speak.
dialogue.cocojenna.undercat.ch4_trial_2: (Telepathy) The forbidden wing opens for you.
dialogue.cocojenna.undercat.finale_1: Light and shadow together make a whole world.
dialogue.cocojenna.undercat.finale_2: (Telepathy) The abyss echo is finally heard.
dialogue.cocojenna.undercat.hub_fallback: Welcome to the Cardboard Kingdom. I am Corrugata, your queen.

guide.cocojenna.open_hint: Right-click to read. Install Patchouli for the full book experience.
guide.cocojenna.p.alpha: Black mud is grief; memory is power; twin stars are partners. Find Alpha at the plaza.
guide.cocojenna.p.appendix: Coco's diary and Jenna's doodles. Alpha: Thank you.
guide.cocojenna.p.basics: Right-click pet, sneak pick up, feed, groom, play. WASD, Alt skill wheel, double Shift dash.
guide.cocojenna.p.bestiary: Hypothermia, Forgotten Shadow, Whisper Puppet, Mimic, Blind Water Lord, Primal Chaos.
guide.cocojenna.p.bond: Affection measures bond. Pet, feed, play, protect—unlock stages over time.
guide.cocojenna.p.coco: A quiet black cat. Don't rush to approach. When she rests her tail on your hand—you've been chosen.
guide.cocojenna.p.cover:
Guardian's Guide

"This isn't a walkthrough. It's a letter to you." — Alpha
guide.cocojenna.p.distill: Purify: break shell → core exposed → press R → memory motes.
guide.cocojenna.p.erosion: Stain → spread → devour → abyss. Paw stamps and light towers help stop it.
guide.cocojenna.p.final: Shadow Claw three phases. Redeem or purge.
guide.cocojenna.p.first_cry: First Cry Village and the Lifeline Yarn Tree. Root cottage is your home.
guide.cocojenna.p.forge: Ironpaw Forge: craft, +0~+10 enhance, repair, socket.
guide.cocojenna.p.four_mad: Four Mad: Banjou, Sanwa, Ashura, Big Orange.
guide.cocojenna.p.gather: Velvet grass, moonstone, mint, catnip. Buy tools at village shops.
guide.cocojenna.p.jenna: The tortoiseshell never stops. When she shows her belly—she trusts you.
guide.cocojenna.p.map: 11 regions from First Cry to Forgotten Tower.
guide.cocojenna.p.memory: Shards and monuments unlock story chapters.
guide.cocojenna.p.morning: Coco sleeps in; Jenna wakes you with a toy. Two beds, hearth, bowls, chests.
guide.cocojenna.p.mud: Black mud aren't monsters—they're unspoken goodbyes.
guide.cocojenna.p.parasite: Drowsy → resistant → assimilation → full corrosion. Use holy water on grey fur.
guide.cocojenna.p.paths: Purr Resonance, Night-Eye Shadow, Chaos Prank.
guide.cocojenna.p.sequence: Sequence 9→1; every 10 levels pick a card. Slots: 4/8/16.
guide.cocojenna.p.sisters: Coco guards, Jenna accompanies. They don't need a hero—just you, here.
guide.cocojenna.p.town: Build towers, recruit cats. /village for status.
guide.cocojenna.p.welcome: Welcome to the Cat Kingdom, Guardian. Protect the princesses until they remember who they are.
guide.cocojenna.p.wheel: Hold Alt for skill wheel, aim, release to cast.

patchouli.cocojenna.entry.abyss.after_sp: 擊敗影爪並淨化原始混沌後，黑泥源頭切斷。已存在的黑泥不會立刻消失——沉睡的悲傷需被一一記起。侵蝕蔓延停止，悲傷之海不再擴張，毛球精靈取代野外黑泥。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.abyss.blind_vo: 淵泥共生者、流浪詩人貓：記憶是沈重負擔，沉入黑泥可達永恆寂靜。領袖「虛舟」自願成為墮落絨尾卻保留意識：「黑泥不是監獄。記憶才是。」
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.abyss.composit: • **記憶殘渣**（約70%）— 消退中的碎片，殘留模糊畫面與半句話。$(br)• **情感結晶**（約20%）— 未被承接的悲傷，決定怪物性格。$(br)• **虛無基質**（約10%）— 完全被遺忘留下的空洞，賦予流動與侵蝕性。
蒸餾打擊（R）可擊碎外殼暴露情感結晶，獲得雙倍殘骸與更高遺物機率。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.abyss.dialecti: 貓之國由「被記住的愛」構成。**被記住，就存在；被遺忘，就消散。**但遺忘是漸進的——溫暖的回憶→模糊的印象→隱約的疼痛→無名的悲傷。這些「正在被遺忘但尚未完全消散」的記憶，就是黑泥的原料。
可可註解：所以淨化不是消滅，是記起。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.abyss.entropy_: 齒輪鎮工匠、鐵算盤三花子：黑泥是維度必然產物，應隔離、轉化、利用。齒輪鎮的「黑泥動力爐」將殘骸轉為能源——三花子的核心機密。
黑泥不是怪物、不是瘟疫、不是詛咒。黑泥是「未被處理的悲傷」在物質世界中的具象化。它是記憶維度運轉時必然產生的副產品——如同火焰必然留下灰燼，愛與思念也必然留下未被承接的眼淚。
這些眼淚匯聚、凝結、變質，最終成為黑泥。因此黑泥不是貓之國的敵人——它是維度的熵增，是秩序必然走向混亂的證明。只要還有貓咪被記住、被遺忘，黑泥就會源源不絕地產生。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.abyss.fallen_r: 雨後，攜帶 **朱槿花之淚** 與 **純淨之淚**，前往 **遺忘高塔** 深處。成功救贖的墮落絨尾恢復記憶，前往黎明高地加入王城舊部。
牠們會記得你——記得你是那個在黑暗中拉牠們一把的人。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.abyss.first_te: 《絨尾創世錄》記載：初代貓王絨尾失去伴侶月瞳的那一夜，祂安靜地坐在窗台上，看著滿月。一滴眼淚滑落王座前，三天後變成了第一滴黑泥。月瞳不是死於戰爭——當現實中最後記得她的人離世，她失去了錨點，化為月光回到維度本身。
這是貓之國第一場被記錄的「失去」，也是黑泥誕生的原點。珍奶塗鴉：一輪彎彎的月亮 🌙
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.abyss.hunger.p: 黑泥沒有個體意識，但有統一的本能：**對「被記住」的飢餓**。它吞噬快樂的記憶不是出於惡意——快樂與悲傷一體兩面，快樂終將失去。被淨化時它不反抗，而是「鬆一口氣」——終於有人記起了它。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.abyss.memory_c: 雨後，黑泥殘骸與星塵土壤混合為記憶陶土。用於建造 **記憶劇場**（/build memory_theater），重播與雙子星的重要時刻。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.abyss.primal_l: 原始混沌被蒸餾淨化後可能留下 **純淨之核**——黑泥曾存在於宇宙的最終證明，一塊墓碑，刻著所有被記住與被遺忘的名字。
將純淨之核鑲嵌於 **記憶紀念碑頂層**。之後紀念碑周圍會飄落金色粒子——黑泥的靈魂終於獲得安寧。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.abyss.promotio: 黑泥從序列9升級到1，靠的是吸收更多悲傷——任何帶情感的記憶都是養分，快樂尤其「美味」。失溫者→遺忘之影→低語泥偶→回憶蛀蟲，逐漸獲得形體與意義。
在遊戲中，高侵蝕區塊會孕育更高序列的威脅；**悲傷之海**（5×5 區塊內至少五處深淵化）會大幅提升黑泥生成。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.abyss.relics_i: 序列3以上黑泥淨化時，極低機率留下「遺物」——不是材料，而是完整物品，是黑泥釋放出的最珍貴記憶。蒸餾擊殺可提升遺物機率。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.abyss.relics_l: 未寄出的信（序列7）｜生鏽的鈴鐺（6）｜半條圍巾（4）｜褪色的項圈（2）｜一滴純淨的水（1）。右鍵使用以釋放封存的記憶與加成。
「一滴純淨的水」據阿爾法推測，是「第一滴眼淚」被淨化後的形態。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.abyss.remains_: 黑泥被蒸餾後物理形態崩解，殘餘物稱為「黑泥殘骸」——黑泥在物質世界留下的最後印記。序列越高，殘骸與副產物越珍貴。
基礎殘骸｜序列7+ 記憶微粒｜序列5+ 暗影結晶｜序列4 悲嘆凝膠｜序列3 混沌結晶、盲水凝膠｜序列2 墮落核心｜序列1 原始混沌碎片。
100 個記憶微粒可右鍵合成隨機記憶碎片。黑泥殘骸+星塵土壤可製 **記憶陶土**（雨後建造記憶劇場）。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.abyss.reverse_: 黑泥的序列與貓之國相反：序列9最接近純粹悲傷（未成形），序列1最接近被記住的存在（近乎生命）。這是悲傷逐漸獲得形體、名字，最終獲得「被記起」可能的過程。
諷刺的是：越接近序列1，就越接近淨化的可能。原始混沌被擊敗後，黑泥的源頭才會切斷。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.abyss.sea_food: • **底層** 序列9 失溫者大量分裂融合$(br)• **中層** 序列8-6 以底層為食進化$(br)• **上層** 序列5-3 掠食者與區域節點$(br)• **頂層** 序列2 墮落絨尾為「國王」$(br)• **最深處** 序列1 原始混沌為「心臟」
遺忘荒原（forgotten_wastes）自然生成中序列黑泥；侵蝕系統在玩家附近按區塊階段補充失溫者。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.abyss.sea_gath: 大量黑泥聚集形成悲傷之海——被黑泥完全覆蓋的區域，內部有獨特生態。進入時會提示：空氣黏稠得像眼淚。雨後源頭切斷，悲傷之海不再擴張。
邊緣偶爾閃爍金色記憶微粒——那是尚未被完全吞噬的溫暖。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.abyss.social.p: **共鳴**：區域黑泥共享感知，發現溫暖記憶時全區知曉。$(br)**犧牲**：受擊時低序列擋在高序列前方。$(br)**哀悼**：高序列被淨化時，周圍黑泥停滯約5秒——「黑泥的眼淚」。
當可可與珍奶情感值高時進入悲傷之海，共鳴會更強烈——黑泥會被你的溫暖吸引。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.abyss.tier_eig: 模糊片段意識，重複生前最後動作。飄浮煙霧，遊蕩在記憶被遺忘的地點。實體：**遺忘幽靈**（forgotten_wisp）。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.abyss.tier_fiv: 足夠完整的自我意識來偽裝。擬態貓形，偽裝成活著時的模樣引誘生命。多數區域首領為此序列。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.abyss.tier_fou: 多意識混亂融合。巨型融合體，多靈魂悲傷共鳴。絨毛森林首領。掉落 **悲嘆凝膠**，可能留下 **半條圍巾**。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.abyss.tier_nin: 完全無意識，僅本能反應。不定形液體，聚集在悲傷濃郁處被動吸收。實體：**熱吸血蟲**（heat_leech）。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.abyss.tier_one: 全黑泥的集體潛意識。巨型活體心臟，所有黑泥的「母親」。黎明高地終局首領。蒸餾擊殺可獲 **純淨之核**。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.abyss.tier_sev: 破碎語言意識，能說零碎詞語。扭曲人偶形，模仿生前最熟悉的聲音。淨化時可能留下 **未寄出的信**。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.abyss.tier_six: 貪婪收集意識，主動尋找特定主題記憶。巨型飛蛾，是悲傷之海的清道夫。可能留下 **生鏽的鈴鐺**。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.abyss.tier_thr: 區域性集體意識。半人形半液態，成為一片區域的黑泥節點。無明港首領。掉落 **盲水凝膠** 與 **混沌結晶**。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.abyss.tier_two: 完整自我意識，但被黑泥囚禁。保留生前外貌，清醒地看著身體被操控。遺忘高塔首領。雨後可用朱槿花之淚與純淨之淚救贖。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.abyss.velvet_c: 王城舊部、初啼村長老：黑泥是絕對邪惡，必須根除。對黑泥的同情是對犧牲者的背叛。影爪政變後的「全面淨化行動」失敗，使他們更加保守。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.alpha_letter.p: 貓之國因你迎來雨後黎明。午夜塔頂，可可有話想說——別說是我說的。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.alpha_rules.p1: 黑泥是悲傷的凝結；記憶是力量；雙子星是夥伴；失敗不會真正失去她們。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.alpha_rules.p2: 可可：阿爾法總是說太多。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.basics.p1: 右鍵撫摸、蹲下抱起、餵食梳毛玩耍。WASD 移動，雙擊 Shift 閃避，Alt 技能圓盤。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.basics.p2: 珍奶塗鴉：一條魚，寫著「好吃！」
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.bestiary.p1: 失溫者、遺忘之影、低語泥偶、模仿者、盲水領主、原始混沌。遭遇後解鎖完整圖鑑。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.bestiary.p2: 可可：序列3以上不要單挑。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.bond.p1: 撫摸、餵食、玩耍、並肩作戰提升羈絆。達到階段解鎖新互動——不要著急。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.build.p1: 小屋、光塔、樂園、工坊、花園。每座建築可升 3 級。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.build.p2: 珍奶的夢想樂園設計圖
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.coco_diary.p1: 「魚還不錯，讓他摸頭。」「珍奶頭上頂著花，很可愛。」「滿月，謝謝你。」
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.distill.p1: 黑泥不是怪物。它們是沒能說出口的再見。讓它們想起自己曾經也是溫暖的——這就是蒸餾。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.distill.p2: 對黑泥使用蒸餾打擊（R）造成額外傷害。核心暴露時觸發淨化，掉落雙倍獎勵並淨化腳下方塊。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.endings.p1: 救贖：影爪化封印物。肅清：天空放晴。雨停了，她們不再離開。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.enhance.p1: +0 至 +10，成功率遞減。高階失敗可能降級。準備護符再挑戰。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.erosion.p1: 四階段：沾染→蔓延→吞噬→深淵化。肉球印章、光塔、擊敗首領可阻止。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.final_phases.p: 墮落將軍→悔恨叔父（可對話救贖）→完全墮落→雙子星共鳴。
可可：無論選什麼我都不怪你。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.first_cry_vill: 生命線球樹是起點。村長老絨尾、商店貓小麥。樹根小屋是可可、珍奶與你的家。
珍奶塗鴉：樹下三個火柴人
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.four_mad_ashur: 全程隱身。為可可擋致命一擊可獲認可。
Peace: meditate at gorge shrine at dawn. Combat: interrupt mantra with distill strikes.
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.four_mad_banjo: 帶珍奶撒嬌可和平收服。成為天氣管理員。
Peace: bring Jenna to charm him. Combat: break four arena seal pillars.
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.four_mad_legen: 斑鳩、三花子、阿修羅、大橘。挑戰影爪前需獲認可。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.four_mad_orang: 無法傷害。頂級料理香氣讓他翻身讓路。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.four_mad_sanwa: 幾何解謎對決。薛丁格玩具錘可破計算。
Peace: hide-and-seek three times. Combat: survive the yarn storm.
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.fragments.p1: 黑勾玉（可可）、橘爪印（珍奶）、金王冠（國度）、藍愛心（你的記憶）。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.gathering.p1: 絨毛草、月光石、薄荷花、貓薄荷。初啼村商店可購工具，工坊提升效率。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.gear_town.p1: 工業心臟。鐵爪鍛造、礦坑。夜晚黑泥襲擊需協防。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.happiness.p1: 床位、食物、裝飾、雙子星在村、防禦成功提升。90+ 有驚喜禮物。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.iron_claw.p1: 鍛造、強化、修理、鑲嵌。傳說武器需設計圖與儀式。
鮭魚、皇冠守護者、姐姐與我、永遠一起、謝謝你來找我們。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.meet_jenna.p1: 玳瑁色的貓永遠停不下來。陪她玩，當她露出肚子時——她信任你了。$(br2)她們是姐妹。黑貓守護，玳瑁陪伴。她們只需要你在這裡。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.meet_jenna.p2: 珍奶塗鴉：一隻歪歪扭扭的蝴蝶
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.monument.p1: 解鎖故事篇章。50 碎片後塔頂結晶點亮，迎來永久黎明。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.monument.p2: 可可：有些記憶我寧願忘記。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.morning.p1: 可可賴床，珍奶叼玩具叫醒你。兩個貓床、壁爐、食物碗與儲物箱。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.morning.p2: 可可：我沒有賴床。我只是在思考。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.overworld.blin: 盲水河區域頭目。掉落「盲水深淵」與深海素材。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.overworld.fall: 四狂之一。可選擇蒸餾或安撫路線，影響王國聲望。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.overworld.grie: 絨都森林深處的精英。核心暴露時使用蒸餾打擊可獲雙倍淨化獎勵。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.overworld.heat: 初啼村周邊的寄生黑泥。擊敗後有機會掉落「魚骨潮汐」良快刀。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.overworld.moon: 月巷與月光海灘的守護黑泥。高機率掉落「月光漣漪」。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.overworld.mud_: 遺忘荒原的黑泥進階形態。分別掉落「青銅守衛」與「墮絨之爪」。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.parasite.p1: 四階段腐蝕：嗜睡、抗拒、同化邊緣、完全腐蝕。定期檢查雙子星毛色是否出現灰斑。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.parasite.p2: 可可：我不會讓這發生在珍奶身上。
武器+5、防具套裝、聖水、雙子星情感>80、Sister Bond>70。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.prologue.p1: 那是隻安靜的黑貓。她看著你的眼神，像是在確認什麼。別急著靠近——當她願意把尾巴輕輕放在你手上時，你就被選擇了。$(br2)珍奶註解：畫了一條小魚 🐟
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.prologue.p2: 歡迎來到貓之國，守護者。這裡是所有被記住的貓咪最後的家。請保護公主們，直到她們想起自己是誰。$(br2)可可註解：說得對。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.promotion.p1: 三選一永久卡牌。踩奶節奏、安撫領域、呼嚕球等——選最適合風格的。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.recruit.p1: 流浪貓 + 空小屋 + 食物。入住後依特長選職業。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.shadow_claw.p1: 影爪——叔父。黑泥注入心臟，悲傷無法被馴服。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.sister_bond.p1: 姊妹羈絆>80 觸發雙子星連攜。同時撫摸、一起餵食可提升。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.skill_wheel.p1: 按住 Alt 展開圓盤，滑鼠選槽位後放開施放。可連續施放。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.skill_wheel.p2: 珍奶畫了追尾巴的圓圈
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.three_paths.p1: 呼嚕共鳴（防禦治癒）、夜瞳暗影（暴擊潛行）、混沌惡作劇（機率閃避）。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.what_is_mud.p1: 黑泥不是怪物。它們是沒能說出口的再見，是眼淚的凝結。記住它們，讓它們安息。
序列9到序列1的力量體系。每10級晉升選卡牌。槽位隨序列增加。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.world_map.p1: 11 區域：初啼村至遺忘高塔。中央紀念碑為樞紐。
patchouli.cocojenna.entry.world_map.p2: 珍奶在終點畫了一條魚
patchouli.cocojenna.guardian_guide.landi: Written by Observer Alpha. Coco and Jenna left notes in the margins...
penetration.cocojenna.archaeologist_map: The archaeologist marks a ruin on your map.
penetration.cocojenna.caravan_reward: Escort complete! Catnip and shadow coins earned.
penetration.cocojenna.caravan_spotted: Bells in the distance—a smuggler caravan passes by.
penetration.cocojenna.coco_remember: Coco hums softly: "I… think I remember this place."
penetration.cocojenna.first_entry: You step into the Cat Kingdom for the first time…
penetration.cocojenna.graffiti_unknown: Cat-claw symbols you cannot read yet.
penetration.cocojenna.gray_whisker.histo: "The Cat Kingdom is woven from memory. Then black mud came."
"Two princesses fell into your world—and you caught them."
penetration.cocojenna.gray_whisker.intro: A grey elder cat rises from a hearth-side cushion.
"Another child guided by moonlight. You've seen the glowing prints, haven't you?"
penetration.cocojenna.gray_whisker.lang_: "Lesson one: the language of the moon—soft, like a purr…"
"Lesson two: claw-writing. Each symbol is a memory…"
"Lesson three: heart resonance. You can read the graffiti now."
penetration.cocojenna.gray_whisker.porta: "Gather moonstone, mud samples, and shards to repair the portal."
penetration.cocojenna.gray_whisker.shard: "Good. Now learn Cat Tongue and read the wall graffiti."
penetration.cocojenna.hut_found: Moonlight leads you to a hidden hut (%1$s, %2$s)
penetration.cocojenna.kitten_thanks: The kitten rubs against you and leaves a flower.
penetration.cocojenna.moon_paw_hint: These prints carry the scent of moonlight…
penetration.cocojenna.need_bottle: You need a glass bottle to collect black mud residue.
penetration.cocojenna.poet_buff: The poet's verse brings you luck.
penetration.cocojenna.portal_materials: Portal repair: moonstone %1$s/10, mud samples %2$s/5, shards %3$s/3
penetration.cocojenna.portal_repaired: The portal is restored. Go—the guardian awaits.

explore.cocojenna.lore.first_cry_story_n: First Cry opened its eyes here; the first meow woke the velvet plains.
explore.cocojenna.lore.first_cry_story_e: Bladesmiths and chefs settled here; cats and people share one hearth.
explore.cocojenna.lore.first_cry_story_s: The moon altar witnesses every sequence ascension.
explore.cocojenna.lore.first_cry_story_w: Travelers enter from the west gate; the cat inn always keeps a bed.
explore.cocojenna.lore.first_cry_canopy_: While First Cry's voice endures, memory never sleeps.
quest.cocojenna.qin_kemu.complete: The Qin cat dynasty rests again.
quest.cocojenna.qin_kemu.mausoleum_found: A hidden mausoleum marked on your heart.
quest.cocojenna.qin_kemu.stage5: Journey to the End for sightseeing.
qin.cocojenna.poetry.01: Empires end sooner than ambition—like a river rolling to the sea.
qin.cocojenna.poetry.02: Red paper can fold a harem sky—I mean it.
qin.cocojenna.poetry.03: A bladeless dagger still fells foes. Believe the paper.
qin.cocojenna.poetry.05: Hibiscus blooms—where did A Fang go? Brewing tea.
qin.cocojenna.poetry.06: Enfeoff a stone—it believes it's a palace.
qin.cocojenna.poetry.09: Each mausoleum is an unfinished dream.
qin.cocojenna.poetry.10: A bladeless dagger—for those who dare to dream.
qin.cocojenna.poetry.11: Li Jiang's on the roof again. She'll bring good news.
qin.cocojenna.afang.comfort: A Fang's mint tea steadies your heart.
qin.cocojenna.afang.guide: The nearest mausoleum lies windward—cut the red seal.
qin.cocojenna.afang.trade: A Fang: tea and chocolate, fair trade.
qin.cocojenna.lijiang.rumor: Li Jiang: Her Ladyship went to a new tomb—follow the prints!
qin.cocojenna.lijiang.trade: Li Jiang shoves red paper into your hands and vanishes.
qin.cocojenna.triangle.morning.qin: Mist still lingers and I'm awake. A Fang—tea. Li Jiang—off the roof.
qin.cocojenna.triangle.morning.afang: My lady, mint tea is ready. Wind favors northeast for tomb rounds.
qin.cocojenna.triangle.morning.lijiang: Best view from the roof! …Fine, I'm coming down.
qin.cocojenna.triangle.paper.qin: Fold the red seals straight—like imperial edicts.
qin.cocojenna.triangle.paper.afang: I'll teach the triple fold so wind won't lift the seal.
qin.cocojenna.triangle.paper.lijiang: I drew a paw print inside—don't tell Her Ladyship!
qin.cocojenna.triangle.mausoleum.lijiang: Fresh prints in the red soil—someone beat us here.
qin.cocojenna.triangle.mausoleum.afang: Steady. Incense first, then the gate—tombs hate haste.
qin.cocojenna.triangle.mausoleum.qin: Each tomb is a poem I never finished. Enter.
qin.cocojenna.triangle.full.qin: You've followed me so long—any regrets?
qin.cocojenna.triangle.full.afang: Brewing tea and folding paper for you is home enough.
qin.cocojenna.triangle.full.lijiang: Regrets? Only that one prank scared Her Ladyship.
qin.cocojenna.triangle.full.qin2: …Silly girls. My tombs keep a tea room for you too.
qin.cocojenna.paperize.success: Paperize—the block turns passable for a while.
qingzhao.cocojenna.poetry.2: Curtain, west wind—thinner than yellow blooms—meow.
qingzhao.cocojenna.poetry.3: Under the plum, Qingzhao—noise fades away.
qingzhao.cocojenna.poetry.4: Last night's rain thinned the blooms; the tree stays green.
qingzhao.cocojenna.poetry.5: A folded scrap for the distant traveler.
weapon.cinematic.cocojenna.fish_bone.1: (Tide rises) The fisher-cat's memory wakes on the blade.
weapon.cinematic.cocojenna.fish_bone.2: Fish circle like the old harbor; tide and meows intertwine.
weapon.cinematic.cocojenna.fish_bone.3: Fish Bone · Tide Wind remembers its name.

weapon.cinematic.cocojenna.iron_rust.3: Iron Rust · Armor Break is fully awakened.
weapon.cinematic.cocojenna.hibiscus.1: (Petals fall) Hibiscus blooms where someone fell.
weapon.cinematic.cocojenna.hibiscus.2: Blood and blossom share one hue; memory walks with pain.
weapon.cinematic.cocojenna.hibiscus.3: Hibiscus · Weeping Blood recalls that farewell.

weapon.cinematic.cocojenna.moonlight.3: Moonlight · Ripple resonates with the night.
